name: Sweet Merge Puzzle
description: Sweet Merge is the most delicious puzzle game youll ever play! Slide and merge matching candies to evolve them into sweeter treats — from tiny bonbons to magnificent candy castles! 12 unique candy evolution tiers, each more spectacular than the last. Chain consecutive merges for Sugar Rush combos, use 4 power candies strategically, and conquer 25 unique challenges. Classic endless mode plus challenge mode. Three difficulty modes, full progress saving!
instructions: Swipe to slide candies mdash match two of the same to merge and evolve them 12 sweet tiers from bonbon to candy castle How far can you merge
